name: @mux-magic/server
description: Single-port Hono front-door for mux-magic. Owns the `serve()` call; mounts @mux-magic/api at /api and hosts the Vite SPA at / (middleware mode in dev, serveStatic in prod). Storybook is run side-by-side (separate port) via `yarn workspace @mux-magic/web storybook`. Replaces the previous two-process (API + tiny static file server) layout.
